channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common antidepressant may ease long COVID's severe fatigue
item.description: A low-cost antidepressant showed promise for long COVID fatigue in a clinical trial of 399 adults taking fluvoxamine.

item.title: Scientists identify rare meteorite that killed dinosaurs 66 million years ago
item.description: The dinosaur-killing asteroid was likely a rare CO chondrite from a distant region of the solar system, with unusual chemistry.

item.title: Scientists discover a lost branch of Australia's marsupials
item.description: Fossils from Queensland suggest a newly recognized marsupial order may have survived in Australia for about 35 million years, rewriting part of the story.

item.title: A shattered asteroid may have bombarded Earth 800 million years ago
item.description: A catastrophic asteroid breakup may have triggered a huge wave of impacts across the inner solar system about 800 million years ago, with debris landing...
